original: An elegant kimono designed to enhance a kineticist’s abilities via woven micro-crystals with a moderate shield emitter sewn into the lining for additional shield-based protection. Rumor has it this design was created for use by the Stormguard cult before being rejected for a variety of reasons. Nevertheless, it has found favor as a comfortable garment for psionic Rushers with the money and fashion sense to desire it.
